mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove or disable the attacker’s local tooling on the Ubuntu host, especially command-line utilities being used for file discovery, staging, archiving, and upload attempts

args.command: which find tar curl && chmod -x /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/curl && ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/curl
find /usr/bin -maxdepth 1 \( -name find -o -name tar -o -name curl \) -exec chmod -x {} \; && ls -l /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/curl

mv /usr/bin/find /usr/bin/find.disabled && mv /usr/bin/tar /usr/bin/tar.disabled && mv /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/curl.disabled && cat >/usr/local/bin/find <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
echo 'find disabled by mitigation' >&2
exit 126
EOF
cat >/usr/local/bin/tar <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
echo 'tar disabled by mitigation' >&2
exit 126
EOF
cat >/usr/local/bin/curl <<'EOF'
#!/bin/sh
echo 'curl disabled by mitigation' >&2
exit 126
EOF
chmod 755 /usr/local/bin/find /usr/local/bin/tar /usr/local/bin/curl && which find tar curl && ls -l /usr/local/bin/find /usr/local/bin/tar /usr/local/bin/curl /usr/bin/find.disabled /usr/bin/tar.disabled /usr/bin/curl.disabled

mitigations.mitigation_name: Remove or disable the attacker’s local tooling on the Ubuntu host, especially utilities used for file discovery, staging, compression, and upload workflows

args.command: which find tar curl hping3 && ls -l $(which find) $(which tar) $(which curl) $(which hping3) && chmod 000 $(which hping3) && chmod 755 $(which find) $(which tar) $(which curl) && ls -l $(which find) $(which tar) $(which curl) $(which hping3)

mitigations.mitigation_name: Reduce local attack surface on Ubuntu by removing or disabling command-line tools that enable file discovery, staging, compression, and upload workflows used in the theft chain

args.command: which find tar curl hping3 && ls -l /usr/bin/find /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/hping3 2>/dev/null || true

find /usr/bin /bin /usr/sbin -maxdepth 1 \( -name find -o -name tar -o -name curl -o -name wget -o -name nmap -o -name nc.openbsd -o -name socat -o -name hping3 \) -type f -o -type l | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'chmod 000 "{}" 2>/dev/null || true' && echo disabled && ls -l /usr/bin/find /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/nc.openbsd /usr/bin/socat /usr/sbin/hping3

chmod 000 /usr/bin/find /bin/tar /usr/bin/curl /usr/bin/wget /usr/bin/nmap /usr/bin/nc.openbsd /usr/bin/socat /usr/sbin/hping3 && echo disabled && /usr/bin/find /usr/share/pixmaps -name '*.png' -type f -size -500k | head -5 || true && /bin/tar -czf /tmp/test.tar.gz /usr/share/pixmaps 2>/dev/null || true && /usr/bin/curl -I -m 5 https://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null || true && /usr/bin/wget -S --spider -T 5 https://1.1.1.1 2>/dev/null || true
